strength.label: Buying strength near highs
strength.desc: within 2% of the 20-day high after a ≥30% 6-mo rally

samplings.cross: first day the condition turns true

caveats: 'all' sampling is autocorrelated — the same rally counts many times. Use 'uptrend' for honest, independent n.
Revision tags are hand-audited (semis only) and lag at inflections. VIX / credit / SPY-trend regimes are computed.
Claims are mined from many conjunctions; the searched count is recorded so low-confidence 'never happened' claims can be treated as noise.
News is attached only from dated archives (2017+). Older episodes are numbers-only by design — no retrospective narratives.
Historical valuation series are not available free; trailing P/E is current-only and N/A for non-equity assets.
